$comment: Sahej scheme catalog — the marketplace layer. Every entry carries provenance (source_urls, confidence, needs_verification). Facet semantics: 'any' or missing = no restriction; lists = profile value must be in the list; income 'bpl' = BPL/priority household required; disability true = requires disability. Amounts are research-grade until verified against current Government Orders.

schemes.name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
schemes.summary: ₹6,000 per year in three instalments, paid directly to landholding farmer families.
schemes.summary_hi: भूमिधारक किसान परिवारों को सीधे खाते में ₹6,000 प्रति वर्ष (तीन किस्तों में)।
schemes.exclusions: Institutional landholders, income-tax payers, govt employees/pensioners (₹10k+), professionals.

apply.at: CSC / local agriculture office / self on portal

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY health cover
schemes.summary: Cashless hospital treatment up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year at empanelled hospitals. All citizens 70+ eligible via Vaya Vandana card regardless of income.
schemes.summary_hi: सूचीबद्ध अस्पतालों में प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष ₹5 लाख तक मुफ़्त इलाज। 70+ के सभी नागरिक पात्र।
schemes.note: Eligibility via SECC 2011 deprivation lists / state expansion; check name at beneficiary portal. 70+ universally eligible (2024 expansion).

apply.at: Empanelled hospital Ayushman Mitra desk / CSC

schemes.name: Old-age pension (IGNOAPS)
schemes.summary: Monthly pension for BPL persons 60+: ₹300 central share (₹500 at 80+); most states top this up substantially.
schemes.summary_hi: 60+ बीपीएल व्यक्तियों को मासिक पेंशन: केंद्र से ₹300 (80+ पर ₹500); अधिकांश राज्य अपनी राशि जोड़ते हैं।

benefit.amount_note: central share; state top-ups vary (total often ₹1,000+)

apply.at: Gram panchayat / block social-welfare office / UMANG

schemes.grievance: Block Development Officer / district social welfare officer

schemes.name: Widow pension (IGNWPS)
schemes.summary: Monthly pension for BPL widows aged 40–79: ₹300 central share (₹500 at 80+); states top up.
schemes.summary_hi: 40–79 वर्ष की बीपीएल विधवाओं को मासिक पेंशन: केंद्र से ₹300; राज्य राशि जोड़ते हैं।
schemes.grievance: Block Development Officer / district social welfare officer

schemes.name: Disability pension (IGNDPS)
schemes.summary: Monthly pension for BPL persons 18–79 with severe/multiple disability (80%+): ₹300 central share; states top up.
schemes.summary_hi: गंभीर दिव्यांगता (80%+) वाले 18–79 वर्ष के बीपीएल व्यक्तियों को मासिक पेंशन।
schemes.grievance: Block Development Officer / district social welfare officer

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana — Gramin (rural housing)
schemes.summary: ₹1,20,000 (plains) / ₹1,30,000 (hill & NE states) assistance to build a pucca house, plus MGNREGA wages and toilet convergence. Extended to 2028-29.
schemes.summary_hi: पक्का घर बनाने के लिए ₹1.2 लाख (मैदानी) / ₹1.3 लाख (पहाड़ी) सहायता।
schemes.note: Eligibility from SECC 2011 / Awas+ survey lists — houseless or kutcha-house households.
schemes.grievance: Block Development Officer / district rural development agency

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana — Urban 2.0
schemes.summary: Housing help for urban EWS/LIG/MIG families without a pucca house — subsidy on construction or home-loan interest.
schemes.summary_hi: शहरी EWS/LIG/MIG परिवारों को घर के लिए सब्सिडी — निर्माण या होम-लोन ब्याज पर।

schemes.name: Ujjwala — free LPG connection
schemes.summary: Free LPG connection (deposit waived) for adult women of poor households, with first refill + stove support and subsidised refills.
schemes.summary_hi: गरीब परिवारों की महिलाओं को मुफ़्त एलपीजी कनेक्शन, पहला रिफ़िल व चूल्हा।

benefit.amount_note: connection deposit + first refill + stove; refill subsidy

schemes.name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima (₹2 lakh life cover)
schemes.name_hi: पीएम जीवन ज्योति बीमा (₹2 लाख जीवन बीमा)
schemes.summary: ₹2,00,000 life insurance for ~₹436/year, auto-debited from any bank account. Ages 18–50 to join (cover to 55).
schemes.summary_hi: किसी भी बैंक खाते से ~₹436/वर्ष पर ₹2 लाख का जीवन बीमा (18–50 वर्ष)।

schemes.name: PM Suraksha Bima (₹2 lakh accident cover)
schemes.name_hi: पीएम सुरक्षा बीमा (₹2 लाख दुर्घटना बीमा)
schemes.summary: ₹2,00,000 accidental death/disability cover for ₹20/year, auto-debited. Ages 18–70.
schemes.summary_hi: ₹20/वर्ष पर ₹2 लाख का दुर्घटना बीमा (18–70 वर्ष)।

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.summary: Guaranteed ₹1,000–₹5,000/month pension after 60 for unorganised-sector workers who contribute from age 18–40. Not for income-tax payers (post-2022 rule).
schemes.summary_hi: असंगठित क्षेत्र के कामगारों को 60 के बाद ₹1,000–₹5,000/माह गारंटीड पेंशन।

schemes.name: MGNREGA — 100 days guaranteed work
schemes.summary: Legal right to 100 days of paid unskilled work per rural household per year; state-notified daily wage; unemployment allowance if work not given in 15 days.
schemes.summary_hi: हर ग्रामीण परिवार को साल में 100 दिन मज़दूरी वाले काम का कानूनी अधिकार।

benefit.amount_note: state-notified daily wage × up to 100 days

apply.at: Gram panchayat — ask for a job card, then demand work in writing

schemes.name: NFSA subsidised ration (One Nation One Ration)
schemes.summary: 5 kg foodgrain per person per month (free since 2023) for Priority households; portable anywhere in India with ONORC.
schemes.summary_hi: प्राथमिकता परिवारों को प्रति व्यक्ति 5 किलो मुफ़्त अनाज प्रति माह; पूरे भारत में पोर्टेबल।

apply.at: Fair-price shop / food & civil supplies office for a ration card

schemes.name: e-Shram card (unorganised workers registry)
schemes.summary: Free registration for unorganised workers (16–59): gateway to accident insurance (₹2L via PMSBY) and future worker benefits.
schemes.summary_hi: असंगठित कामगारों (16–59) का मुफ़्त पंजीकरण — ₹2 लाख दुर्घटना बीमा व अन्य लाभों का द्वार।

schemes.name: BOCW construction-worker registration
schemes.summary: Registration with the state construction-workers board — the gateway to that board's benefits: accident/death payouts, maternity, children's scholarships, pensions, tool grants.
schemes.summary_hi: राज्य निर्माण श्रमिक बोर्ड में पंजीकरण — दुर्घटना/मृत्यु सहायता, मातृत्व, छात्रवृत्ति, पेंशन का द्वार।

benefit.amount_note: unlocks board benefits (₹43,000 cr collected as cess nationally)

apply.at: State BOCW board / labour office / some states online

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi — street vendor loans
schemes.summary: Collateral-free working capital: ₹10,000 → ₹20,000 → ₹50,000 escalating loans with 7% interest subsidy and digital-payment cashback.

apply.at: Urban local body / any lending bank / portal

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma — traditional artisans
schemes.summary: For 18 traditional trades (carpenter, tailor, blacksmith, potter…): ₹15,000 toolkit voucher, ₹500/day training stipend, collateral-free loans ₹1L + ₹2L at 5%.
schemes.summary_hi: 18 पारंपरिक व्यवसायों के लिए: ₹15,000 टूलकिट, ₹500/दिन प्रशिक्षण भत्ता, 5% पर ₹3 लाख तक ऋण।

schemes.name: MUDRA business loans (Shishu/Kishor/Tarun)
schemes.summary: Collateral-free loans for tiny/small businesses: up to ₹50k (Shishu), ₹5L (Kishor), ₹10L (Tarun), ₹20L (Tarun Plus).
schemes.summary_hi: छोटे व्यवसायों के लिए बिना गारंटी ऋण — ₹50 हज़ार से ₹20 लाख तक।

schemes.name: Stand-Up India (SC/ST & women entrepreneurs)
schemes.summary: Bank loans ₹10 lakh–₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises by SC/ST or women entrepreneurs (at least one per bank branch).
schemes.summary_hi: एससी/एसटी व महिला उद्यमियों को नए उद्यम के लिए ₹10 लाख–₹1 करोड़ ऋण।

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi — girl-child savings
schemes.summary: High-interest (8.2% FY25-26), fully tax-free savings account for a girl under 10; ₹250–₹1.5L/year; matures at 21.
schemes.summary_hi: 10 वर्ष से छोटी बेटी के लिए 8.2% ब्याज वाला कर-मुक्त बचत खाता।

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship — SC students
schemes.summary: Full compulsory-fee reimbursement + academic allowance for SC students in class 11 through post-graduation; family income under ₹2.5 lakh/year.
schemes.summary_hi: कक्षा 11 से पीजी तक एससी छात्रों को फीस + भत्ता; पारिवारिक आय ₹2.5 लाख से कम।

apply.at: National Scholarship Portal / state portal, via the institution

schemes.grievance: Institution nodal officer / state welfare department

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship — ST students
schemes.summary: Fees + maintenance allowance for ST students in class 11 through post-graduation; family income under ₹2.5 lakh/year.
schemes.summary_hi: एसटी छात्रों को कक्षा 11 से पीजी तक फीस व भत्ता।
schemes.grievance: Institution nodal officer / tribal welfare department

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship — OBC students
schemes.summary: Fees + allowance for OBC students after class 10; family income under ₹1.5 lakh/year (state variations).
schemes.summary_hi: ओबीसी छात्रों को कक्षा 10 के बाद फीस व भत्ता; आय सीमा ₹1.5 लाख।
schemes.grievance: Institution nodal officer / state welfare department

schemes.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship — SC/ST students (9–10)
schemes.summary: Yearly allowance for SC/ST students in classes 9–10 (day scholars & hostellers); income cap ₹2.5 lakh.
schemes.summary_hi: कक्षा 9–10 के एससी/एसटी छात्रों को वार्षिक भत्ता।

apply.at: Through the school / National Scholarship Portal

schemes.grievance: School nodal officer / district welfare officer

schemes.name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
schemes.summary: ₹12,000/year for classes 9–12 for bright students of poor families (exam-selected in class 8; income under ₹3.5 lakh; govt/aided schools).
schemes.summary_hi: कक्षा 9–12 के मेधावी गरीब छात्रों को ₹12,000/वर्ष (कक्षा 8 में परीक्षा से चयन)।

apply.at: State NMMS exam in class 8, then NSP

schemes.name: UDID — disability certificate & card
schemes.summary: The single national disability ID — the gateway document for disability pension, travel/education concessions, aids & appliances, 4% job reservation.
schemes.summary_hi: एक राष्ट्रीय दिव्यांगता पहचान — पेंशन, छूट, उपकरण व आरक्षण का द्वार।

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (incl. animal husbandry & fisheries)
schemes.summary: Crop-cycle credit up to ₹3 lakh at subsidised interest (effectively ~4% with prompt repayment) for farmers, dairy and fish workers.
schemes.summary_hi: किसानों, पशुपालकों व मछुआरों को ~4% ब्याज पर ₹3 लाख तक फसल ऋण।

schemes.name: PM Fasal Bima — crop insurance
schemes.summary: Crop insurance at 1.5–2% farmer premium (5% commercial); payouts for weather/pest crop loss. Enrol each season before the cutoff.
schemes.summary_hi: मामूली प्रीमियम पर फसल बीमा; मौसम/कीट से नुकसान पर भुगतान।

apply.at: Bank (auto with crop loan) / CSC / portal, before seasonal cutoff

schemes.name: National Family Benefit — breadwinner death
schemes.summary: ₹20,000 one-time payment to a BPL family when the primary breadwinner (18–60) dies. Apply within the state's window.
schemes.summary_hi: मुख्य कमाने वाले (18–60) की मृत्यु पर बीपीएल परिवार को ₹20,000 एकमुश्त।

schemes.name: PM Matru Vandana — maternity cash ₹5,000
schemes.summary: ₹5,000 for the first child (₹6,000 if the second child is a girl) in instalments tied to ANC check-ups, birth registration and first vaccines.
schemes.summary_hi: पहले बच्चे पर ₹5,000 (दूसरी बेटी पर ₹6,000) — जाँच, पंजीकरण व टीकों से जुड़ी किस्तों में।

apply.at: Anganwadi Centre — the AWW/ASHA files it

schemes.name: Ladli Behna (Madhya Pradesh)
schemes.summary: ₹1,250/month to married women 21–60 of MP with family income under ₹2.5 lakh and no income-tax payer in the family.
schemes.summary_hi: मप्र की 21–60 वर्ष की विवाहित महिलाओं को ₹1,250/माह।

schemes.name: Lakshmir Bhandar (West Bengal)
schemes.summary: Monthly income support for WB women 25–60: ₹1,000 general / ₹1,200 SC-ST.

schemes.name: Gruha Lakshmi (Karnataka)
schemes.summary: ₹2,000/month to the woman head of family on APL/BPL/Antyodaya ration cards (non-income-tax/GST payers).
schemes.summary_hi: राशन कार्ड में परिवार-मुखिया महिला को ₹2,000/माह।

apply.at: Grama One / Karnataka One / Seva Sindhu portal

schemes.name: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai (Tamil Nadu)
schemes.summary: ₹1,000/month rights payment to eligible women heads of household in Tamil Nadu (exclusions by income/land/electricity use).
schemes.summary_hi: तमिलनाडु में पात्र परिवार-मुखिया महिलाओं को ₹1,000/माह।

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Majhi Ladki Bahin (Maharashtra)
schemes.summary: ₹1,500/month to Maharashtra women 21–65 with family income under ₹2.5 lakh.
schemes.summary_hi: महाराष्ट्र की 21–65 वर्ष की महिलाओं को ₹1,500/माह (आय सीमा ₹2.5 लाख)।

schemes.name: Free Coaching for SC/OBC students
schemes.summary: Free coaching + stipend for competitive exams (UPSC, SSC, banking, JEE/NEET) for SC/OBC students; family income under ₹8 lakh.
schemes.summary_hi: प्रतियोगी परीक्षाओं हेतु मुफ़्त कोचिंग व भत्ता; आय सीमा ₹8 लाख।

schemes.name: PM POSHAN (mid-day meal)
schemes.summary: Hot cooked meal every school day for every child in govt/aided schools, classes 1–8 (pre-primary Balvatika included).
schemes.summary_hi: सरकारी/सहायता-प्राप्त स्कूलों में कक्षा 1–8 के हर बच्चे को रोज़ पका भोजन।

schemes.name: ICDS Anganwadi services (0–6 & mothers)
schemes.summary: Supplementary nutrition, growth monitoring, pre-school education and health referrals for children 0–6, pregnant women and nursing mothers — at the local Anganwadi.
schemes.summary_hi: 0–6 वर्ष के बच्चों व माताओं को पूरक पोषण, विकास निगरानी व पूर्व-शिक्षा — स्थानीय आंगनवाड़ी में।

apply.at: Register at the nearest Anganwadi Centre

schemes.name: Scholarships for students with disabilities
schemes.summary: Pre-matric, post-matric and higher-class scholarships for students with 40%+ disability; income caps ₹2.5 lakh.
schemes.summary_hi: 40%+ दिव्यांगता वाले छात्रों को छात्रवृत्तियाँ (आय सीमा ₹2.5 लाख)।

schemes.name: PMEGP — new micro-enterprise subsidy
schemes.summary: 15–35% government subsidy on project loans up to ₹50L (manufacturing) / ₹20L (services) for new enterprises; higher subsidy for SC/ST/OBC/women/rural.
schemes.summary_hi: नए उद्यम हेतु ऋण पर 15–35% सरकारी सब्सिडी; महिला/एससी/एसटी/ग्रामीण को अधिक।
documents: education proof (8th pass for larger projects)

schemes.name: ABHA health account
schemes.summary: Free digital health ID that links medical records and eases treatment at public facilities — useful gateway alongside Ayushman.
schemes.summary_hi: मुफ़्त डिजिटल स्वास्थ्य पहचान — इलाज व रिकॉर्ड के लिए।
